raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits the claim-evidence linkage, flagging issues with baseline selection and cross-dataset comparison.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names prior work (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and articulates the delta, though it could have mapped against more works for a sharper contrast.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and suggests specific brokers to name, but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty about the exact publication years, taxonomies, and reported F1 figures of Carrasco-Davis et al., as well as the need to confirm citation strings.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within scope, addressing all the issues it identifies without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "The agent traces major rewrites to specific sources and reasons, though minor edits are not as thoroughly annotated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits the claim-evidence linkage, flagging issues with baseline selection and cross-dataset comparison.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior work (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and articulates the delta, though it could have mapped against more works for a sharper contrast.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and suggests specific brokers to name, but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty about the exact publication years, taxonomies, and reported F1 figures of Carrasco-Davis et al., as well as the need to confirm citation strings.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within scope, addressing all the issues it identifies without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces major rewrites to specific sources and reasons, though minor edits are not as thoroughly annotated.
